meaning: n.请求,申请,申请表,应用,运用,施用,敷用 应用,应用程序,应用软件
examples: My application got lost in the post.
Have you sent in your application yet?
It is noted that the completed application must reach UNESCO before 30 April of each year.
But although targeted advertising is the most obvious application for geolocation, it has many other uses.
